TextView.android:text:
1. Data Collection and Usage

UniPool collects and processes personal information solely for the purpose of providing a secure and efficient carpooling service.

For Customers (Passengers):
• School/Work Email Address – Used to verify and identify users.
• Full Name – Required for identification and service personalization.
• Password – Used to protect your account.

For Drivers:
• Email Address – Used for communication and account management.
• Phone Number – Required for direct contact regarding ride coordination.
• License Plate Number – Used to ensure the authenticity of the vehicle.
• Vehicle Capacity – Collected to determine available passenger slots.
• GPS Location – Collected to provide real-time ride-tracking.

All collected data is stored securely in our database and is accessible only to authorized personnel. UniPool does not sell, rent, or distribute user information to third parties without explicit consent, except as required by law.
